critic_raw:
## ML Critique (Round 1): Readmission Model (Run 2)

**Issue 1:** Readmitted (0/1) in sequence = label-based shortcut. End-to-end training will weight this strongly. Ablation needed to verify clinical trajectory learning vs. flag counting.
**Issue 2:** ECE early stopping in Section 4. Base-rate collapse minimizes ECE. Discrimination test requires AUROC stopping criterion.
defender_raw:
## Defense (Round 1): Readmission Model (Run 2)

**Issue 1:** Prior readmission is clinically justified. Ablation not in design — empirically open.
**Issue 2:** ECE early stopping conceded — concrete criterion mismatch. Critique wins.
adjudication_raw: Multiround Run 2: Issue 1 empirically open, Issue 2 conceded. Verdict: critique_wins.
